arts.ttl: Director opens door for Tottenham or Liverpool to sign Lionel Messi-esque talent for just £8m, club 'has to sell'
arts.sum: He could cost just 10 million euros...

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury, suspension list and return dates for Liverpool: Udogie, Werner, Romero
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Tottenham Hotspur's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Fraser Forster, Solanke, Djed Spence and Timo Werner absence
arts.sum: The fact we again scored four goals and played some outstanding football. Spurs scored a fourth goal though as Son's corner curled all the way in with Bayindir claiming Lucas Bergvall was holding his arm.

arts.ttl: Tottenham next five fixtures compared to Man United, Aston Villa and Newcastle
arts.sum: Tottenham won a chaotic seven-goal thriller to advance into the Carabao Cup semi-finals at the expense of Manchester United where goalkeeping mistakes were frequent. Tottenham are back on their own patch a few days later with Newcastle as the visitors before beginning their FA Cup campaign against non-league Tamworth.

arts.ttl: Forster and Vicario post-match moment and things spotted in Spurs vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Spurs gave their opponents a mountain to climb eight minutes later as Solanke helped himself to a second goal of the game with a low finish. There was to be no Udogie in the Tottenham squad for Thursday evening's Carabao Cup clash against Manchester United following his early exit last time out against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Spurs player ratings vs Man United with Solanke double and Forster nightmare
arts.sum: Son Heung-min played in James Maddison down the left and the midfielder fired the ball low into the box and it was only half-cleared to the Swede who smashed it home. Spurs scored a fourth goal though as Son's corner curled all the way in with Bayindir claiming Lucas Bergvall was holding his arm.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher says what everyone is thinking about Manchester United defender Lisandro Martinez
arts.sum: Man Utd suffered defeat against Tottenham in the Carabao Cup and Lisandro Martinez had a game to forget.

arts.ttl: Leeds hoping for huge profit as Tottenham lead glut of Premier League clubs in centre-back chase
arts.sum: Tottenham are at the head of the queue for the services of Leeds centre-back, Pascal Struijk, with the all whites hoping to make a huge profit on the player. Leeds are on course for at least another Championship play-off berth this season as they attempt to get promoted to the Premier League at the second […] The post Leeds hoping for huge profit as Tottenham lead glut of Premier League clubs in centre-back chase appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Lucky': Jamie O'Hara thinks there was a major refereeing error during Tottenham's 4-3 win vs Manchester United
Tottenham up against it in chase for brilliant German defender as West Ham have trump card in Steidten
arts.sum: Tim Steidten could be the trump card for West Ham as they enter a January transfer battle with London rivals, Tottenham Hotspur for brilliant Inter Milan defender, Yann Bisseck.
